title: Indian ocean
description: 🌊 Indian Ocean 🌊 - ocean themed aquamarine blue 16x Crystal PvP resourcepack
body:
🌊 **Indian Ocean Crystal PvP Pack | 16x | FPS Boost | Custom Sounds | Low Fire**               
Immerse yourself in the deep blues of the Indian Ocean with this elegant 16x PvP texture pack. Designed for competitive players seeking clarity, speed, and a serene visual edge, this pack blends oceanic calm with the intensity of crystal PvP combat.

✨ Features:
Ocean-Themed Visuals: Cool blue accents and clean textures bring traditional PvP gear into a refreshing, aquatic aesthetic.

1. Crystal PvP Optimized: Refined visuals for sharp hit detection and ultra-responsive gameplay.  
2. FPS Friendly: Smooth 16x resolution ensures high performance even on low-end systems.  
3. Custom Sounds: Crisp, ocean-inspired audio cues for hits, blocks, and crystal breaking enhance immersion.  
4. Integrated Low Fire: Minimalist fire overlay helps you stay focused in battle without visual clutter.  
5. Beautiful sky texture: use [FabricSkyboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/nuit) or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) to get it working

_Whether you're raiding in anarchy or dueling in the arena, the Indian Ocean Pack delivers clarity and cool vibes—without sacrificing PvP performance._

Need more packs? Join my [discord](https://discord.gg/8RDNrXfxc5)
